task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into the Bahmni system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, apps menu, or clinical dashboard is visible, indicating successful authentication past the login screen.

task_completion.description: The agent entered a search query for the target patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar or patient search interface in Bahmni contains 'Fatima', 'Al-Hassan', or 'BAH000005'.

task_completion.description: The target patient appears in the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Fatima Al-Hassan' and/or 'BAH000005' is visible in the list of patient search results.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The clinical dashboard, patient summary, or patient profile for Fatima Al-Hassan is open.

task_completion.description: The agent displayed the full demographics of the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A detailed demographics view or registration profile is visible, showing the patient's full name (Fatima Al-Hassan), ID (BAH000005), gender (Female), and birth year (1965) or age.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Bahmni graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser displaying the Bahmni application, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the patient information into a text editor to simulate success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient demographics are displayed within the styled Bahmni web interface, not in a plain text editor, word processor, or terminal window.

integrity.description: The displayed patient record is genuine and not manually constructed outside the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements (buttons, tabs, layout) match the Bahmni/OpenMRS system, and the patient ID (BAH000005) is correctly associated with the name in the system UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Fatima Al-Hassan. Identifier: BAH000005. Gender: Female. Birth Year: 1965. The system is Bahmni (OpenMRS-based). The agent must log in with Username: superman, Password: Admin123, search for the patient, and display their full demographics in the Bahmni UI.
